ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the security */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price accounting for adjustments */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of the security (e.g., stock, bond, derivative) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the issuer of the security */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the security was issued */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date the security matures (for bonds and derivatives) */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Annual interest rate for bonds */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price for derivatives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of trading account (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the trading account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the trading account */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the security traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade execution */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trade was initiated */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES trading_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, feed) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for support */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data source was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who set the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price threshold, news event) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, acknowledged, resolved) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the security */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was done */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis (e.g., buy, hold, sell) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the analysis (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade execution log */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the executed trade */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trade was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade execution (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "execution_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "execution_fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_executions_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_logs" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who performed the check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance check was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance check (e.g., trade, account, data) */,
  "compliance_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
